zh.Halsham, East Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾哈爾善姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Constable IV於1428年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆時，他的父親Sir John Constable III44歲，母親Margaret Umfraville37歲。他於1449年3月7日與Lora FitzHugh在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1477年3月18日之前在英國越可爾哈爾善姆。

zh-hans.Of, Halsham, York, England: 英国英格兰越可爾哈爾善姆

zh-hans.Halsham, East Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾哈爾善姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Constable IV于1428年出生在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁哈爾善姆时，他的父亲Sir John Constable III44岁，母亲Margaret Umfraville37岁。他于1449年3月7日与Lora FitzHugh在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1477年3月18日之前在英国越可爾哈爾善姆。

nameMeanings.name: Constable
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (southeastern): occupational name for the law-enforcement officer of a parish, from Middle English, Old French conestable, cunestable, from Late Latin comes stabuli ‘officer of the stable’. The title was also borne by various other officials during the Middle Ages, including the chief officer of a household or court, or a military officer, and this may in some cases be the source of the surname.
Americanized form of Dutch Constapel, an occupational name for the chief gunner aboard a ship or in the garrison of a fort.

variants.name: Costabile
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Aldo, Antonio, Ciro, Nino, Agnese, Angelo, Duilio, Enrico, Ercole, Franco, Palma.
occupational name from medieval Greek kontostablēs ‘chamberlain’, from medieval Latin comes stabuli, literally ‘count of the stable’ (see Constable ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Constable IV was born in 1428, in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Constable III, was 44 and his mother, Margaret Umfraville, was 37. He married Lora FitzHugh on 7 March 1449, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died before 18 March 1477, in Halsham, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Constable IV est né en 1428, à Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Constable III, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Margaret Umfraville, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Lora FitzHugh le 7 mars 1449, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé avant 18 mars 1477, à Halsham, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Constable IV 1428 in Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Constable III 44 und seine Mutter Margaret Umfraville 37. Er hat am 7. März 1449 in Yorkshire, England Lora FitzHugh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb vor 18. März 1477 in Halsham, Yorkshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Constable IV è nato il nel 1428 nel Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Constable III, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Umfraville, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Lora FitzHugh il 7 marzo 1449, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì prima del 18 marzo 1477, nel Halsham, Yorkshire, England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア

ja.Halsham, East Riding, Yorkshire, England: イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャム
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Constable IVが1428年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングハルシャムで生まれた時，父Sir John Constable IIIは44歳，母Margaret Umfravilleは37歳であった。1449年3月7日にイギリスヨークシュアイアでLora FitzHughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1477年3月18日以前にイギリスヨークシュアイアハルシャムで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Constable IV(이)가 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 할샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Constable III(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Umfraville(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1449년 3월 7일 영국 요르크실르에서 Lora FitzHugh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1477년 3월 18일 이전 영국 요르크실르 할샤에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Constable IV nasceu em 1428, em Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Constable III, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Umfraville, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Lora FitzHugh em 7 de março de 1449, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 18 de março de 1477, em Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Constable IV родился в 1428 г. в местности холшам, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Constable III было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Umfraville, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Lora FitzHugh 7 марта 1449 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер перед 18 марта 1477 г. в местности холшам, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Constable IV nació en 1428, en Halsham, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Constable III, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Margaret Umfraville, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Lora FitzHugh el 7 de marzo de 1449, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió antes de 18 de marzo de 1477, en Halsham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
